message:
feat(polyfills): Round 10 - AES-CTR, fs.access, Buffer.transcode

- crypto: Add AES-256-CTR and AES-128-CTR encryption modes (stream cipher)
- fs: Add accessSync/access with constants (F_OK, R_OK, W_OK, X_OK)
- buffer: Add Buffer.transcode for encoding conversion (utf8/latin1/utf16le)
- dns: Fix _modules registration for require('dns'), add sync mode support

All 23 tests passing.
